creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
I have problem where HTML5 audio and video doesn't work in Firefox 12.

I think it hasn't been worked since Firefox 4. Worked before.
No WebM, OGG, nothing. Many of ports have been updated since FF4,
but it still doesn't work.

Firefox port is compiled with default options.
I have nothing fancy configured here and that's the only thing in this
machine that doesn't output neither sound or video.

Yes, it doesn't work even under different user and no extensions.
Maybe I'm missing something but WHAT?
